title: Garlicky Bouncy Romantic British Mozzarella Pizza
description: A delicious and romantic British-inspired pizza featuring mozzarella cheese, perfect for a special occasion. Cooked to perfection in a ttukbaegi earthenware cookware for an authentic experience.
instructions: Preheat the ttukbaegi earthenware cookware to 250°C (475°F) for 30 minutes before cooking.
Place the pizza dough on a lightly floured surface and roll out to a thickness of 1-2 cm (0.5-1 in).
Transfer the dough to the preheated ttukbaegi earthenware cookware and spread the tomato sauce evenly over the dough, leaving a 1-cm (0.5-in) border around the edges.
Top the sauce with the mozzarella cheese, garlic, chopped fresh oregano, and chopped fresh basil.
Drizzle the extra-virgin olive oil over the top and sprinkle with a pinch of fleur de sel and a few grinds of freshly ground black pepper.
Bake the pizza in the preheated ttukbaegi earthenware cookware for 15-20 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the pizza from the cookware and let it cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
Sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley before serving.
